title: threat_detection_service
description: One threat detection or anomaly detection service instance — AWS GuardDuty detector, GCP Security Command Center finding source, Azure Defender plan. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for enablement checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (GuardDuty: detector ID, SCC: source name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

region.description: Region the service is active in.

is_enabled.description: Threat detection is active and monitoring.
